en.bdb: EULOGY OF THE NON-TEMPORAL LORD
The Lord is One and he can be attained through the grace of the True Guru.
Copy of the manuscript with exclusive signatures of The Tenth Sovereign.
The non-temporal Purusha (All-Pervading Lord) is my Protector.
The All-Iron Lord is my Protector.

Gurmukhi: srb kwl jI dI riCAw hmnY ]

Transliterations.en: sarab kaal jee dhee rachhiaa hamanai ||
Transliterations.hi: सरब काल जी दी रछिआ हमनै ॥
Transliterations.ipa: sərəb kɑl d͡ʒi d̪i rəɕɪəɑ həmənæ.
Transliterations.ur: سرب کال جیِ دیِ رچھآ همنَے ۔۔

en.bdb: The All-Destroying Lord is my Protector.

Gurmukhi: srb loh jI dI sdw riCAw hmnY ]

Transliterations.en: sarab loh jee dhee sadhaa rachhiaa hamanai ||
Transliterations.hi: सरब लोह जी दी सदा रछिआ हमनै ॥
Transliterations.ipa: sərəb lɔh d͡ʒi d̪i səd̪ɑ rəɕɪəɑ həmənæ.
Transliterations.ur: سرب لوه جیِ دیِ سدا رچھآ همنَے ۔۔

en.bdb: The All-Iron Lord is ever my Protector.

Gurmukhi: AwgY ilKwrI ky dsqKq ] qÍ pRswid caupeI ]

Transliterations.en: aagai likhaaree ke dhasatakhat || tavai prasaadh chaupiee ||
Transliterations.hi: आगै लिखारी के दसतखत ॥ त्व प्रसादि चउपई ॥
Transliterations.ipa: əɑGæ lɪkʰɑri ke d̪əsət̪əkʰət̪. t̪ʋ pɹəsɑd̪ t͡ʃoʊpei.
Transliterations.ur: آگَے لکھاریِ کے دستکھت ۔۔ تو پرساد چاپای ۔۔

en.bdb: Then the signatures of the Author (Guru Gobind Singh). BY THY GRACE QUATRAIN (CHAUPAI)
I Salute the One Primal Lord.

en.bdb: Who pervades the watery, earthly and heavenly expanse.
